allow: Bash(python -c "from circuitbreaker import CircuitBreaker; cb = CircuitBreaker\(failure_threshold=3, recovery_timeout=60, name='test'\); print\('state attr:', cb.current_state\); print\('methods:', [m for m in dir\(cb\) if not m.startswith\('__'\)]\)")
